teams.name: Seattle Mariners
headlines: Mariners snap four-game losing streak with 7-3 win over Rangers
George Kirby delivers solid 5.2 innings with 5 strikeouts
Luke Raley hits 5th home run of the season
Bryce Miller begins rehab assignment from oblique strain
J.P. Crawford recovering from shoulder inflammation in Arizona

keyUpdates: George Kirby earned his 3rd win of the season (3-2) with 5.2 innings of one-run ball
Luke Raley continues torrid start: .318/.375/.636 with 5 HR and 13 RBI
Cole Young went 2-for-3 with 2 RBI, a walk, and his first stolen base of the season
Brendan Donovan day-to-day with left hip tightness
Bryce Miller (oblique) threw first rehab start with increased velocity
Andrés Muñoz earned the save, striking out the only batter he faced
details.situation: Mariners are 9-13 on the season after snapping a four-game skid. The team is dealing with early-season injuries to key players but showing signs of life with young prospects like Cole Young contributing.

last_game.highlights: George Kirby pitched 5.2 innings allowing 1 run; Luke Raley hit his 5th home run; Cole Young drove in 2 runs and stole a base

next_game.note: Series rubber match - winner takes the three-game series

teams.name: Seattle Seahawks
headlines: Seahawks begin voluntary offseason program on April 20
Jaxon Smith-Njigba signed to multi-year extension
Linebacker Chazz Surratt re-signed
Free agency tracker: Key roster moves continue

keyUpdates: Voluntary offseason workout program begins April 20, 2026
All-Pro receiver Jaxon Smith-Njigba signed multi-year extension
Linebacker Chazz Surratt re-signed
Special teams standout Brady Russell signed to two-year deal
Cornerback depth being evaluated after roster moves
details.situation: Seahawks are in offseason mode preparing for the 2026 season. Key extensions and re-signings have prioritized keeping the core together. The team will open the 2026 season on September 9.

last_game.highlights: Seahawks won Super Bowl LX - parade held February 11 in Seattle

teams.name: Seattle Kraken
headlines: Kraken lose season finale 2-0 to Avalanche, finish 34-37-11
Miss playoffs for 4th time in 5 years
President Ron Francis stepping down
Goalie prospect Victor Ostman makes NHL debut in finale

keyUpdates: Lost final game 2-0 to Colorado Avalanche on April 16
Finished season with record of 34-37-11 (79 points)
Missed playoffs for 4th time in franchise's 5-year history
President Ron Francis announced he is stepping down
19-year-old prospect Berkly Catton showing development
Goalie Joey Daccord nominated for King Clancy Memorial Trophy for humanitarian work
Victor Ostman got first NHL start in season finale; parents traveled from Stockholm to attend
details.situation: Disappointing season ends with Kraken missing playoffs again. Front office changes are underway with Ron Francis stepping down. Team finished in bottom eight of league standings. Young prospects like Shane Wright and Berkly Catton provide hope for future.

last_game.highlights: Season finale; Victor Ostman made NHL debut; Kraken shut out

next_game.note: Offseason begins with front office changes expected

teams.name: Seattle Sounders FC
headlines: 2026 MLS season underway
Sounders defeated Colorado Rapids 2-0 in February
Final season under spring-autumn format before MLS switches to autumn-spring schedule

keyUpdates: 2026 season is the last under traditional spring-autumn MLS format
League switching to autumn-spring schedule for 2027
Started season with 2-0 win over Colorado Rapids on Feb 23
All matches available on Apple TV; select matches on FOX
details.situation: Sounders are competing in the 2026 MLS season. This is a transitional year as the league prepares to shift to a fall-spring schedule format. The team qualified for 2025 playoffs but was eliminated in first round by Minnesota United.

next_game.note: Full schedule includes matches through October/November

teams.name: Seattle Storm
headlines: Storm select Awa Fam with No. 3 overall pick in 2026 WNBA Draft
Spanish center joins young core with Dominique Malonga
Five players signed to training camp contracts
Brittney Sykes acquired in trade with Washington Mystics

keyUpdates: Drafted 6'4" Spanish center Awa Fam 3rd overall in 2026 WNBA Draft
Awa Fam is 7th international player drafted in Top 3 in WNBA history
Signed five players to training camp contracts: Rennia Davis, Beatrice Mompremier, Jaelyn Brown, Elle Ladine, Jalyn Brown
Acquired Brittney Sykes from Washington Mystics in exchange for Alysha Clark and 2026 first-round pick
Awa Fam signed rookie scale contract on April 16
details.situation: Storm are building for the future with a strong draft selection. Awa Fam joins Dominique Malonga to form a young, formidable frontcourt. Training camp roster taking shape with multiple signings.

last_game.highlights: Previous season concluded; team preparing for 2026 campaign

next_game.note: Training camp underway; regular season begins in May

teams.name: Washington Huskies
headlines: 2026 football schedule unveiled
Spring game 'Dawgs After Dark' took place April 2
First year in Big Ten conference
Full schedule includes matchups against Penn State, Oregon, USC

keyUpdates: UW Football Coaches Clinic featured stellar speaker lineup in early April
Spring game 'Dawgs After Dark' held April 2
2026 schedule opens Sept. 5 vs Washington State
Key matchups: Penn State (Nov 7), at Oregon (Nov 28), at USC (Oct 3), Iowa (Oct 10)
First season as member of Big Ten conference
details.situation: Huskies are transitioning to the Big Ten conference for 2026 season. Spring practices concluded with the annual spring game. Full schedule features challenging conference matchups including road games at USC, Nebraska, Michigan State, and Oregon.

last_game.highlights: Annual spring football game concluded spring practice period

next_game.note: Apple Cup rivalry opens the season; first game as Big Ten member
